title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Claude Code and Codex across five categories: user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost/speed. He argues that comparing these tools is the wrong framing and instead recommends focusing energy on a specific undisclosed priority he identifies as the actual deciding factor.
